consistency_check.mechanics_alignment: Consistent with typical 5e spell design, focusing on sensory manipulation.

quality_assessment.clarity: High. The effect is clearly defined.
quality_assessment.completeness: Complete. All necessary mechanical components (save, range, duration, components) are present.
quality_assessment.flavor: The description 'weave a distracting string of words' fits the enchantment school and the mechanical effect (disadvantage on perception of others).

mechanics_review.effect: Target has disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive any creature other than the caster.
exceptions: Creatures immune to being charmed automatically succeed.
Advantage on save if the caster or companions are fighting the target.
mechanics_review.action_economy: Standard action economy for a 2nd-level control/debuff spell.

recommendations.suggested_changes: None required; the mechanics are sound and the exceptions (charmed immunity, combat advantage) are well-defined constraints.
